title: Mizoram HSSLC Result 2025 Released @ mbse.edu.in

detail.title: Mizoram HSSLC Result 2025 Released @ mbse.edu.in
detail.short_info: Mizoram HSSLC Result 2025 - The Result of Mizoram Board of School Education 2025 is released for 12th Class at mbse.edu.in and all the concerned candidates can look up for the Mizoram HSSLC Result 2025 online. All those who took the Mizoram HSSLC Result 2025 (MBSE) can view their Mizoram HSSLC Result 2025 through Online mode. Candidates will not be informed about the Mizoram HSSLC Result 2025 through any offline modes. For more details on the Mizoram HSSLC Result 2025, read this article.

content.text: Mizoram HSSLC Result 2025 is Out! - Mizoram HSSLC Result 2025 has been released on 06-05-2025, Online Result for HSSLC Examinations.
The official link to check the Mizoram HSSLC Result 2025 is activated and is released officially
Check here - Mizoram HSSLC Result 2025 (Link Activated)

sections.heading: How to download the Mizoram HSSLC Result 2025?

content.text: The process is given below to download the Mizoram Board of School Education Result 2025, and candidates follow the instructions to download the Mizoram HSSLC Result 2025.

items: Visit the official site of the Mizoram HSSLC @ mbse.edu.in
There, you can see the home page of the organization.
Check for the Results section on the screen.
On that page, you can see the program code along with the name of the examination.
There, you need to check the Exam Results release date, choose the desired one.
Then, you all need to click on it.
A list of declared results will appear on the screen.
Choose your course.
The student will navigate to another page.
Here, they will enter the application ID/ Roll Number and submit it.
The result will appear on the screen.
Save the visible Results 2025.
